creator: h@hartzer.sh
text:
I apologize, I meant VirtualBox, not Qemu. I did test both EFI and BIOS for VirtualBox, and both were able to install.

I was able to test a burned DVD image of -RELEASE with two machines and had no issues (at least with getting to the curses prompt -- I did not try to install). One more had an issue, but it may have been the drive, and I did not verify with an old CD that it was not the drive. So far so good on this end.
